results.title: Overlapping writes to same filing produce a complete, valid file (real SEC calls)
results.feedback:
兩個都出現這樣的錯誤，為什麼有這樣的錯誤，你之前會測不出來呢？
(finlab-x-backend) dong.wyt@Dongs-MacBook-Air fin-lab-x-sec-download-parsing % python -c "from backend.ingestion.sec_filing_pipeline import SECFilingPipeline; p = SECFilingPipeline(); r = p.process('AAPL', '10-K', fiscal_year=2025); print('done:', r.metadata.parsed_at)"
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "<string>", line 1, in <module>
TypeError: SECFilingPipeline.__init__() missing 5 required positional arguments: 'downloader', 'preprocessor', 'converter', 'fallback_converter', and 'store'
(finlab-x-backend) dong.wyt@Dongs-MacBook-Air fin-lab-x-sec-download-parsing %
